LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. FKA, MBNA AMERICA BANK, NOTICE OF HEARING REGARDING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED, CONFIRMING THAT ARBITRATION AWARD IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER AND AGAINST RESPONDENT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing Re; Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award, Notice Of Non-Appearance
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. FKA, MBNA AMERICA BANK, Notice of Hearing Regarding Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, CONFIRMING THAT ARBITRATION Award is entered in favor of Petitioner and against Respondent. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
